# CompleteIO

**Instance Method**

Indicates that the dext completed an asynchronous read-write call.

## Declaration

```swift
virtual void CompleteIO(uint32_t requestID, uint64_t bytesTransferred, kern_return_t IOStatus);
```

## Parameters

- **requestID**: An opaque identifier, originally provided in the corresponding [doc://com.apple.blockstoragedevicedriverkit/documentation/BlockStorageDeviceDriverKit/IOUserBlockStorageDevice/DoAsyncReadWrite] call.
- **bytesTransferred**: The number of bytes transferred.
- **IOStatus**: The status of the request.

## Discussion

The dext calls this method to indicate completion of an asynchronous read-write call. Use the `requestID` parameter to determine which [doc://com.apple.blockstoragedevicedriverkit/documentation/BlockStorageDeviceDriverKit/IOUserBlockStorageDevice/DoAsyncReadWrite] call resulted in this callback.

## Accessing the Device

- **DoAsyncUnmap**: Sends an asynchronous request to the dext to reclaim storage by unmapping.
- **BlockRange**: A structure that represents a range of blocks.
- **DoAsyncSynchronize**: Forces the hardware buffer to flush data blocks to the media.
- **DoAsyncEjectMedia**: Ejects the media.
- **Complete**: Indicates that the dext completed an asynchronous call.
- **DoAsyncReadWrite**: Starts an asynchronous read or write operation.
- **IOUserStorageOptions**: Options that affect the performance of read-write operations.
